title: Charts Show Trouble for Trump on Iran War
summary: President Trump's popularity is dropping because of the Iran war. Charts show that gas prices have gone up to about $4 a gallon since the war started. This makes people worried about money. Trump's approval rating on the economy fell from 43% to 29%. His overall approval rating also went down from 52% to 40%. The war is causing problems for the global economy and pushing prices higher. This could be bad for Trump in the upcoming elections. Democrats are doing better in some elections because of these issues. People are talking about the elections at a big conservative meeting.

questions.question: Why are people worried about the Iran war?
Where did conservatives talk about elections?

background_read: This article is about President Trump and how the Iran war is affecting his popularity. It uses charts to show changes in gas prices and approval ratings. The war started in 2025 and has made things more expensive, which worries people. Trump is the president of the United States, and elections are coming up where people will vote for new leaders. The article mentions Democrats doing better in some votes because of economic issues.
Article_Structure: WHO: President Trump and the American public
WHAT: Trump's popularity is dropping due to the Iran war and higher gas prices
WHY: The war is causing economic problems that could hurt Trump in elections

perspectives.description: The war raises prices and lowers approval ratings.
